title: Euro stablecoin project Qivalis adds 25 banks ahead of launch
summary: Qivalis expands to 37 banks after adding 25 new members across 15 countries, boosting euro stablecoin plans ahead of a second-half 2026 launch.

title: OpenAI launches overseas AI lab in Singapore with $234M commitment
summary: OpenAI is opening its first overseas applied AI lab in Singapore through a $234 million partnership expected to create more than 200 technical roles.

title: Nickel Trims Gains With Indonesia Export Controls in Focus
summary: Nickel drifted lower, trimming gains seen as Indonesia moved to tighten control over some of the country’s biggest commodities exports, including some forms of the metal.

title: Zama acquires TokenOps to deploy encrypted token distributions for institutional issuers
